messages.content: Shaggy (Meme Edition) (1% Power) vs. Axel Stone (Streets of Rage)

And i know it's a joke but i just wanted to do something funny

Shaggy (Meme Edition) (1% Power) vs. Adam Hunter (Streets of Rage)

In a fight between Shaggy (Meme Edition) with 1% power and Adam Hunter from Streets of Rage, it's likely that Adam's superior fighting skills would give him the advantage. Adam Hunter is a master of various forms of fighting, including judo and wrestling. He's also quick and agile, with great reflexes and a powerful physique that makes him a formidable opponent. Even though Shaggy has the power of memedom behind him, it's doubtful that it would be enough to overcome Adam's skills.

If we were to hypothetically assume that Shaggy (Meme Edition) has 5% power, this would give him slightly more capabilities in a fight, but he would still not be powerful enough to defeat Adam Hunter.

Adam Hunter's fighting skills, agility, and strength make him a formidable opponent, and even with a small increase in power, Shaggy would still struggle to keep up. If Shaggy's (Meme Edition) power level was boosted to 10%, it would give him more raw power and abilities than before. At this level, he would be more of a challenge for Adam Hunter than before, but it's still likely that Adam's martial arts skills would give him the advantage.

At 20% power, Shaggy (Meme Edition) would have significant abilities that Adam Hunter would likely have difficulty defending against. Shaggy would be stronger, more durable, and faster than before and would have more unique abilities that could give him a significant advantage.

Shaggy (Meme Edition) (30% Power) vs. Adam Hunter (Streets of Rage)

At 30% power, Shaggy (Meme Edition) would become an incredibly powerful entity capable of reality-warping abilities and almost god-like power. In a fight with Adam Hunter, it's likely that Shaggy's powers would be too much for Adam to handle. 

Shaggy at 30% percent power could potentially warp reality itself allowing him to create powerful attacks and manipulate his surroundings to his advantage. These abilities would be too much for even Adam's formidable fighting skills to contend with. 

Even though Adam is known for his incredible strength and fighting abilities, it's unlikely that he could overcome the immense power of Shaggy's reality-warping abilities at 30% power. In this scenario, Shaggy would almost certainly come out victorious.

At 50% power, Shaggy (Meme Edition) becomes a near-unstoppable force capable of various supernatural and reality-warping abilities. It's highly likely that Adam Hunter wouldn't stand much of a chance against Shaggy at this level of power.

Shaggy (Meme Edition) (1% Power) vs. Null (Baldi's Basics)

In a fight between Shaggy (Meme Edition) with 1% power and Null from Baldi's Basics, it's hard to say who would have the upper hand as neither character is particularly well-known for their combat abilities. 

However, Null from Baldi's Basics is a character who has immense speed and is capable of teleportation, making it difficult for opponents to land damaging attacks. Additionally, Null has a sound-based attack that can stun enemies, giving her an advantage in battle.

On the other hand, Shaggy with 1% power would have almost no chance of keeping up with Null's speed and agility, making it unlikely he could hit her with any of his attacks. With a 20% power boost, Shaggy (Meme Edition) would gain significant abilities that would allow him to put up a better fight against Null from Baldi's Basics. He would be faster and stronger, and he would have more powerful attacks that could potentially damage Null.

Overall, it would still be a challenging fight, but with 20% power, Shaggy would be much better equipped to handle Null's attacks and potentially come out on top.
Shaggy (Meme Edition) (30% Power) vs. Null (Baldi’s Basics)

At 30% power, Shaggy (Meme Edition) would be a very formidable opponent for Null from Baldi's Basics. He would be even faster, stronger, and more powerful, with reality-warping abilities that would give him an advantage in the fight.

Null's speed and teleportation abilities would pose a challenge, but Shaggy's reality-warping powers could allow him to create and manipulate the environment around Null, making it difficult for her to evade his attacks. Overall, at 30% power, Shaggy would be a difficult opponent for Null and could potentially come out on top in the battle.
Shaggy (Meme Edition) (100% Power) vs. Null (Baldi’s Basics)

At 100% power, Shaggy (Meme Edition) would be almost unstoppable and would have god-like powers and abilities. Null from Baldi's Basics would be no match for Shaggy in this scenario.

Shaggy's reality-warping abilities and overwhelming strength would give him an insurmountable advantage in the fight. He could manipulate reality itself, making it almost impossible for Null to match his speed or land any attacks on him.

Additionally, Shaggy could use his reality-warping powers to create his own sound-based attacks that could potentially disable or stun Null.

In this scenario, Null from Baldi's Basics would not stand a chance against Shaggy (Meme Edition) with 100% power. Shaggy would dominate the fight, using his god-like powers to overpower Null and ultimately achieve victory.
